body: I'm applying for the Platform Engineer role because it matches the direction of my work: improving delivery systems, making infrastructure repeatable, and helping engineering teams operate software with less release and reliability risk.

In my current contract work, I designed infrastructure, environment strategy, and CI/CD to move a startup from PoC toward production readiness. I used Terraform, identity-based deployments, and dev/prod environment separation to reduce provisioning from more than two hours to under ten minutes, while tightening CI credentials, pinned dependencies, and environment-scoped secrets.

Before that, at Duotify, I maintained delivery infrastructure across Azure DevOps and self-hosted GitLab CI on Linux, supported AWS EC2/S3/RDS environments, and improved deployment readiness for client-facing systems. That work reduced release preparation overhead by more than 30 minutes and gave me practical experience supporting engineers through pipeline reliability, runner availability, and production constraints.
